name: Magearna – Another, but trapped?
description:
In this story you and your friend will meet Magearna which trully have ability "Soul-heart" for a reason...

Contains another lore, so you can forget about "It's not lore included!"

Also in some moments of story even barely knowing you she can protect you, it's not because weird feelings, just you reminding her someone

There mega concept of Mega Magearna, she will not mega evolve by mega ring for some reason...
creator: Tyran_ua
